channel.title: Applied Mathematics on dasarpAI
channel.description: Recent content in Applied Mathematics on dasarpAI

item.title: From Eigenvalues to Singular Value Decomposition — How a Matrix Reveals Its Natural Directions, Strengths, and Hidden Simplicity
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
From Eigenvalues to Singular Value Decomposition
#

How a matrix reveals its natural directions, strengths, and hidden simplicity
#

Suppose we are given a matrix:

\[ M= \begin{bmatrix} 4&0\\ 3&-5 \end{bmatrix}. \]

At first sight, it is only a rectangular arrangement of four numbers. But the matrix is not merely storing numbers. It represents a linear transformation: it accepts a vector and produces another vector.

item.title: One Word, Many Meanings: Understanding Every Kind of Product in Linear Algebra and Quantum Computing
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
One Word, Many Meanings: Understanding Every Kind of Product in Linear Algebra and Quantum Computing
#

One of the first surprises students encounter while learning linear algebra, machine learning, or quantum computing is that the word product does not always mean the same thing.

item.title: Real-Life Applications of Mathematics
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
Real-Life Applications of Mathematics
#

Welcome to the fascinating world of mathematics! Math isn’t just about solving equations in a classroom—it is deeply woven into the fabric of our daily lives. From predicting natural disasters to optimizing business strategies, mathematics helps us make sense of the world.

In this thread, we’ll explore 16 key areas of mathematics and their surprising real-world applications. And mind it all this tip of iceberg. This article is specially for those who who studied maths in school and college and today they are completely in the different field and they find it difficult to understand the usecases of maths except counting numbers and money calculations. :)
